description: Add homepage URL to the Supabase plugin to enable the side panel 'open tab' feature.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/supabase && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Supabase plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects' to both the Supabase plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: SupabasePlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/supabase/src/index.ts (add homepage property to SupabasePlugin class)
- plugins/supabase/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The SupabasePlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class SupabasePlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'supabase';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Supabase';
  override readonly displayName = 'Supabase';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://supabase.com/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://supabase.com/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects"
```

Constraints:
- Use `https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects` (the dashboard), NOT just `https://supabase.com` (marketing page).
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
